sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 425 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.27. 2. For orders on CMA No.3414/2024. 3. For orders on CMA No.3415/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 29.04.2026 Matter is pending since 2024 without any progress. Diary demonstrates that applicant has made no effort in the preceding three years to have the matter listed or heard. Even today applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
